# Conceptual provenance only

- Source inspected: https://github.com/lingzhi227/agent-research-skills
- Commit inspected: `9e6c085d65e313e475e921fdfe795ac11eb7589e`
- Inspection date: 2026-07-13
- Source files copied: none

No repository-level license was found in the audited snapshot. To avoid redistributing unlicensed source or prompts, this project does not vendor files from that repository.

The local composition layer independently implements general research concepts that also appear in the wider academic-agent ecosystem, including atomic method decomposition, bidirectional math/code mapping, formal reasoning, algorithm specification, and backward traceability from manuscript claims to evidence. Wording, artifact schemas, routing, and implementation in this repository were authored independently from the local research requirements and the licensed sources listed in `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md`.

If the upstream repository later adds a clear license, reassess before importing any file.
